steps.title: Identify the cause verb
steps.content: The sentence says forest fragmentation inevitably leads to alterations in local ecological processes. The blank needs a verb meaning causes, produces, or gives rise to those alterations.

steps.title: Reject opposite meanings
steps.content: Choice B means prevents, which contradicts the idea that fragmentation produces changes. Choice C means includes within a larger category. Choice D means weakens or reduces. The causal verb fits the sentence's logic. The answer is A.
